title: A fast blue star-like UFO reported  in Goiânia [2001]
excerpt: SEPT 6th, 2001. Time: 19h14pm. Duration: 2 minutes. In the city of Gioânia, State of Goiás, two witnesses spotted an unidentified flying object, the “size of 2 stars” in the firmament, with blue color and at high speed. text_preview: SEPT 6th, 2001. Time: 19h14pm. Duration: 2 minutes. In the city of Gioânia, State of Goiás, two witnesses spotted an unidentified flying object, the “size of 2 stars” in the firmament, with blue color and at high speed. The UFO appeared to be at an altitude of 30km and moving from East to West. According to the witnesses’ report, the sighting took place under favorable visibility conditions. The COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command] report provides even more details given by the witness: “He cannot identify the shape because it looked like a car headlight in his direction (without a d
summary: Two witnesses in Goiânia saw a fast blue star-like UFO the size of two stars moving west at ~30 km altitude for 2 minutes; shape undefined.
